Google Chrome.risk: Outdated web browsers are a primary entry point for malware and phishing attacks.
Google Chrome.remediation:
1. Open Chrome.
2. Click the three dots in the top-right corner.
3. Go to 'Help' -> 'About Google Chrome'.
4. Chrome will automatically find and apply the latest update. Relaunch when prompted.

Mozilla Firefox.risk: Outdated web browsers are a primary entry point for malware and phishing attacks.

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC.risk: Vulnerabilities in document readers can allow attackers to execute malicious code on your system.

Java 8 Update 371.risk: Older versions of Java have numerous security flaws that are actively exploited.
